description_long: This is a modern, wall-mounted range hood with a sleek, rectangular chimney and a wide, flat base. The front face features a glossy black control panel with touch-sensitive buttons and a digital display, as well as a small, metallic brand logo on the left. The body is primarily constructed from brushed stainless steel, giving it a matte metallic finish with subtle reflections. The sides and rear are plain, with no visible controls or embellishments, emphasizing a minimalist design. The vent and filter areas are not visible from these views, suggesting they are located on the underside of the base. The overall appearance is contemporary and functional, suitable for upscale urban kitchens.
description: A sleek, stainless steel range hood with a glossy black touch control panel and minimalist design, featuring a prominent rectangular chimney and wide base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glossy black control panel with touch buttons, digital display, and a metallic brand logo on the left.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain, brushed metallic surface with no visible controls or logos.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, flat metallic surface with no visible openings or controls.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a plain metallic finish and no visible features.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, metallic emblem is present on the left side of the front black panel.
attribute_control_panel_type: Touch panel located on the front face, featuring illuminated touch-sensitive buttons and a digital display.
attribute_vent_placement: Vents are not visible in the provided views, but are likely located on the underside of the base.
attribute_filter_design: None visible; filters are likely located underneath the base and not shown in these views.
attribute_lighting_fixtures: None visible in the provided images.
